summary: Iteration 81 - All owner protection features verified working: ABHIJEET KUMAR (ASR1001) is properly set as owner with full control, delete protection returns 403, Team tab shows golden owner card, Credentials tab shows owner with full access, WhatsApp tab is present in CRM Dashboard, no duplicate Bookings tabs
context_for_next_testing_agent: All owner protection features verified: 1) GET /api/owner-info returns ABHIJEET KUMAR with staff_id ASR1001, is_owner=true, role=super_admin, 2) DELETE /api/admin/staff-accounts/ASR1001 returns 403 with proper error message, 3) Team tab shows golden owner card with OWNER badge, ASR1001, Owner & Managing Director designation, PROTECTED ACCOUNT label, and 'Cannot be deleted' text, 4) Credentials tab shows owner with Full Access and Protected badges, 5) WhatsApp tab is present in CRM Dashboard with sub-tabs (Dashboard, Inbox, Campaigns, History, Templates, Settings), 6) No duplicate Bookings tabs - only Service Price tab exists

features_verified.credentials_tab_owner: WORKING - Shows owner with Full Access and Protected badges, full control text
features_verified.whatsapp_tab_present: WORKING - WhatsApp tab in CRM Dashboard with Dashboard, Inbox, Campaigns, History, Templates, Settings sub-tabs
features_verified.no_duplicate_bookings: WORKING - Only Service Price tab exists, no duplicate Bookings tabs
